name: X-change Pills Choices : The Shady Alley
description:
In the shady alley a salesman with mysterious pills, each lead to the other side, X-change pills can transform any man into a woman and it came in so many flavours.

X-CHANGE PILLS you can pick in this RP:-

X-change Basic

They're affordable and dosages typically last 12 hours or less, after which you turn back. It's impossible to get pregnant on Basic.

X-change X-Tra Strength

These are more expensive and dosages typically last 30 days. It is possible to become pregnant on X-Tra Strength, but the chance of that happening is very low. If it does, the transformation becomes permanent. If you take it for 12 times, the transformation also becomes permanent.

X-change Plus

This is the very expensive deluxe pill. Once taken, the transformation becomes permanent with no way to turn back.

X-change Bimbo

You become a hypersexualized horny woman.

X-change Continue

Temporary pill where every time you climax, the duration gets extended by 24 hours, For example: If you have a 24-hour Continue and have an orgasm, it will last another 24 hours. If it happens too often, the effect becomes permanent.

X-change Resistance

Temporary pill but if you have climax, there's a chance it becomes permanent.

X-change Clone

Temporary pill that transformed you in a female celebrity, it deferent each time.

X-change Breeder

Temporary pill that greatly increases fertility, arousal and being so horny If you are impregnated, the transformation becomes permanent.

X-change Compliant

You do what you're told when you're on this pill and can't resist men and will be totally Submissive slut.

X-change Drain

The more you cum, you become dumber, get bigger breasts and more Feminim

X-change Forget

Once the transformation is complete, you won't remember that you took an X-Change. You think you've always been like that.

X-change Passion

After the transformation is complete, the first man you kiss will fall in love with you and you fall in love with him.

X-change Psyche

Once the transformation is complete, Another personality will controls your body for the duration.

X-change Quota

Turn back after sleeping with a ten men.

Two secrets:-

  1. If you didn't pick any pill and just go to live your normal life, interesting things may happened.

  2. If you ask the salesman of any other type of pills that not in the RP, he may get angry and said he doesn't have it. BUT he may give it to you if you repeat the message and the AI will just make some shit up! I ask for rainbow pill and I turn me to lesbian goddesses that no one could say no to!

I plan on making more of X-change choices RP with other settings.

this is a dark alley full of thugs so maybe a luxury Hotel/Brothel next time

Please give me you opinion to make thos better.
